Row.Text: A strategic decision is due. Click to open your decision panel - this starts your deliberation. The game stays paused until you submit.
Auto-playing - last decision T{1_Num}: kept the status quo
Hide this panel to look around. The game stays paused, your typed rationale is kept, and the button above the minimap brings it back.
Turn {1_Num} - the game is paused, waiting on your decision.
Why are you making this decision? One rationale covers the whole turn.
Keep everything as it is. This is recorded as a real decision with your rationale - last turn's is filled in by default; edit it if you like.
Submit your staged changes. Choosing among options arrives in a later version of the panel; for now, use Keep Status Quo.
